title: Ctenodon lyonnetii

It belongs to the order Celastrales, which is a group of flowering plants known for their distinctive fruits and berries. The genus Ctenodon is part of a larger group called Celastraceae, which comprises around 70 genera of shrubs and small trees. Ctenodon lyonnetii is often found in dry and mountainous regions, where it can thrive in a variety of conditions.
